summary: ThreeDScene: translucent ball of radius R=1.3 + one YELLOW highlighted cross-section disk at height z driven by ValueTracker z_tr. Phase advances z from -R to +R through checkpoints; always_redraw + a fading GREEN stack of up-to-20 already-visited slices. Fixed-frame panel has z, r(z), running ∫πr²dz, and V_full = 4/3πR³.
